# Unmute AI

> AI-powered academic paper writing platform that helps researchers write better papers faster with citation management, evidence-grounded drafting, and multilingual support.

## What is Unmute AI?

Unmute AI is a web application for academic paper translation and citation management. Researchers can write in their native language (e.g., Japanese, Chinese, Korean, German) and get publication-ready translations that match the target journal's style and conventions.

## Key Features

- Real-time bidirectional translation (source and translation side-by-side)
- Journal-specific style formatting (8 academic journal styles)
- LaTeX-aware translation (preserves \cite{}, \ref{}, equations)
- IMRAD structure checking (Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion)
- Citation Auto-Pilot (sentence-by-sentence citation suggestion with one-click insertion)
- Evidence-grounded writing with verified citations (DOI/PMID verified)
- Version control for translation iterations
- Transparent cost tracking

## Supported Languages

17 languages: Japanese, English, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Korean, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese (Brazilian), Russian, Italian, Hindi, Turkish, Arabic, Indonesian, Polish, Persian

## Pricing

- Free: 0 JPY/month - 10,000 chars/month, 3 documents
- Pro: 980 JPY/month (~$6.50 USD) - 100,000 chars/month, all journal styles
- Max: 2,980 JPY/month (~$20 USD) - Unlimited translation, all features

## Links

- Website: https://unmute-ai.com
- Pricing: https://unmute-ai.com/pricing
